stem: A dishwasher, a smart thermostat and a digital camera all contain embedded systems.
model_answer: An embedded system is a computer system built into a larger device to perform a dedicated set of functions. It usually has limited memory and processing power and runs fixed software stored in ROM, rather than being user-reprogrammable like a general-purpose computer.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Describe what is meant by an embedded system.

mark_points.text: a computer system built into a larger device to carry out a specific dedicated task
accepted_alternatives: a system dedicated to one function

mark_points.text: typically has limited memory/processing power and runs fixed software (often stored in ROM)
